# Research - 2026-07-14

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> Tuesday, `date -u +%u` = 2. Weekly repos (claude-code, aider) skipped per
> daily-only cadence rule. Kilocode merged variant inheritance fix (#12175,
> `e2b609e`), preserving model + reasoning level through session forks.
> Cline shipped manual API key escape hatch for OAuth (#12254), transient
> refresh failure hardening (#12255), and session startedAt metadata
> (#12270). Opencode fixed composer caret preservation in desktop app
> (#36503). Previous brief's items #954 and #955 were backfilled with
> `auto-implement` labels (7 open auto-implement issues now, up from 0).

## Executive Summary

- **#1 (~30m, STILL PENDING)**: Issue #954 (idle cwd StatusBar) remains
  unimplemented. Yesterday's brief flagged this as the top priority after
  the labeling fix. Port opencode `34e5809`: add `cwd?: string` to
  `StatusBarProps` in `src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx:8-25`, render
  `path.basename(process.cwd())` when `isStreaming === false &&
  leaderActive === false`. Feed from `ChatPage.tsx` and `LogsPage.tsx`.
  Test: assert segment present when idle, omitted when streaming. The
  issue now has the `auto-implement` label and is visible to Agent 3.
- **#2 (NOT PORTABLE, DIFFERENT AUTH MODEL)**: Cline #12254 added manual
  API key input as an OAuth escape hatch (K keybinding in login dialog,
  fallback option when configured). Alexi uses SAP AI Core service keys
  (full JSON in `AICORE_SERVICE_KEY`), not OAuth refresh tokens. Our auth
  surface is `src/providers/auth.ts:1-106` (typed errors only, no refresh
  logic) and service-key parsing in `src/providers/sapOrchestration.ts`.
  The OAuth failure mode does not exist here. Skip.
- **#3 (NOT PORTABLE, SDK-LEVEL TOKEN REFRESH)**: Cline #12255 fixed
  transient network errors during token refresh being misclassified as
  invalid_grant, causing permanent logouts. The fix: throw on transient
  failure instead of returning null, and write providers.json atomically
  (stage to temp file + rename). Alexi's service-key auth has no refresh
  tokens or multi-process credential writes. Our `NetworkError` at
  `src/providers/auth.ts:41` is the error type, but there's no refresh
  handler to harden. Skip.
- **#4 (NOT PORTABLE, DESKTOP APP)**: Opencode #36503 preserved composer
  caret position after requests in the desktop app (React state fix,
  `packages/app/`). Alexi is CLI + Ink TUI, no web composer. Skip.
- **#5 (LOW VALUE, TELEMETRY)**: Cline #12270 stores `startedAt` in auth
  metadata when starting a session (analytics/billing feature). We track
  session metadata in `src/core/sessionManager.ts:1-300` and persist to
  `~/.alexi/sessions/`. Adding `startedAt: Date.now()` to session
  creation is trivial (~5m), but no downstream consumer (billing,
  analytics dashboard, usage reports) exists. Skip until a use case
  materializes.
- **#6 (POTENTIAL, MODERATE, ~2h)**: Kilocode #12175 fixed session fork
  variant inheritance. When forking a session, the fork now preserves the
  source's selected model **and reasoning variant** (e.g., extended,
  normal, fast). Alexi's `/fork` command at
  `src/cli/interactive.ts:702-718` creates a new session with
  `state.currentModel` but does not copy the transcript or preserve any
  variant/reasoning-level selection (we don't track variants). Porting
  this first requires implementing variant selection (not a single
  upstream commit — needs design: CLI flag? TUI menu? Per-model
  defaults?). Too large for a daily brief item. Surface as a potential
  enhancement if a user reports forking pain, but do not pursue
  proactively. Skip.
- **Rotation**: kilocode 0 dryness (active), cline 0 dryness (active),
  opencode 0 dryness (active). Weekly repos not polled today. No
  demotions.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Show working directory in idle StatusBar (command, ~30m, STILL PENDING)

- **What**: Add a `cwd?: string` prop to `StatusBarProps` in
  `src/cli/tui/components/StatusBar.tsx:8-25`, rendering
  `path.basename(process.cwd())` (or `~/...` under `$HOME` via existing
  `src/cli/tui/utils/pathFormat.ts:10`) when `isStreaming === false &&
  leaderActive === false`. Feed the prop from `ChatPage.tsx:122` and
  `LogsPage.tsx:108`. Test: render `<StatusBar isStreaming={false}
  leaderActive={false} ... />` and assert the segment is present; with
  `isStreaming={true}`, assert omitted (avoid streaming jitter).
- **Why**: Agent Manager worktrees under `~/.alexi/worktrees/` make cwd
  non-obvious. Alexi's StatusBar already truncates model names to 20
  chars because segment space is tight; idle-only cwd is the right slot.
  Issue #954 was filed 2026-07-12 requesting this exact feature, citing
  the same opencode upstream PR. The issue now has the `auto-implement`
  label (backfilled 2026-07-13) and is visible to Agent 3.
- **Source**: sst/opencode `34e5809` "feat(tui): show idle session
  directory" (2026-07-11T20:31:57Z), PR #36457, single-file diff
  `packages/tui/src/component/prompt/index.tsx` +11/-0. Also
  https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/commit/34e58090595d44e3e7cc37498f16753a98627456.
  Alexi issue #954 (2026-07-12).
- **Category**: command. **Size**: small (~30m).
- **Status**: PENDING (item #1 from 2026-07-13 brief, still
  unimplemented).

#### 2. Manual API key escape hatch for OAuth (NOT PORTABLE)

- **What**: Cline #12254 added a way to configure OAuth providers (cline,
  cline-pass) with a dashboard API key when OAuth login fails: "Enter API
  key manually" option in the configured dialog, K keybinding in the
  login dialog. Saving clears stale OAuth tokens so the key wins.
  `isProviderConfigured` now counts a persisted API key.
- **Why**: Cline uses WorkOS OAuth with refresh tokens for auth. Alexi
  uses SAP AI Core service keys (full JSON in `AICORE_SERVICE_KEY`, no
  OAuth, no refresh tokens). Our auth surface is
  `src/providers/auth.ts:1-106` (typed error classes only) and
  `src/providers/sapOrchestration.ts` (service-key parsing). The OAuth
  failure mode does not exist here. The escape-hatch UX (manual key entry
  when OAuth breaks) has no analogue.
- **Source**: cline/cline `5d3778b` "feat(cli): manual API key escape
  hatch for Cline OAuth providers (#12254)" (2026-07-13T18:14:11Z), PR
  #12254. Full commit message at
  https://github.com/cline/cline/commit/5d3778b.
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: N/A (not portable).
- **Status**: SKIP (different auth model).

#### 3. Transient auth refresh failure hardening (NOT PORTABLE)

- **What**: Cline #12255 fixed `getValidClineCredentials()` returning
  `null` (= session dead, wipe credentials) for BOTH rejected refresh
  tokens AND transient network errors (laptop waking from sleep, 500s).
  The fix: throw on transient failure so callers keep stored credentials
  and retry; only return `null` when the refresh token is genuinely
  rejected (invalid_grant). Also write `providers.json` atomically (stage
  to pid-unique temp file, rename into place) since concurrent reads of a
  partial write parse as empty = logged out.
- **Why**: High-impact Cline SDK fix (prevented hard logouts on network
  blips), but not portable to Alexi. We use service keys, not OAuth
  refresh tokens. There is no refresh handler to harden. Our
  `src/providers/auth.ts:41` defines `NetworkError` as a typed error, but
  no code path retries a failed service-key parse or writes credentials
  atomically (service keys are env vars, not files we write).
- **Source**: cline/cline PR #12255 "fix(sdk): don't log users out when
  token refresh fails due to network/server errors"
  (2026-07-13T19:02:49Z), merged commit `cbf4096`. PR body (50 lines) at
  https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/12255.
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: N/A (not portable).
- **Status**: SKIP (different auth model).

#### 4. Preserve composer caret after requests (NOT PORTABLE)

- **What**: Opencode #36503 fixed the desktop app's composer caret
  position being reset after submitting a request. React state fix in
  `packages/app/`.
- **Why**: Alexi is CLI + Ink TUI (`src/cli/tui/`). No web composer, no
  desktop app. The Ink `InputBox` component at
  `src/cli/tui/components/InputBox.tsx` uses `ink-text-input`, which
  manages its own cursor state. This is a desktop-app-only UX polish.
- **Source**: sst/opencode `a625d35` "fix(app): preserve composer caret
  after requests (#36503)" (2026-07-14T00:04:11Z), PR #36503.
- **Category**: command. **Size**: N/A (not portable).
- **Status**: SKIP (desktop app, not CLI).

#### 5. Session startedAt metadata (LOW VALUE, TELEMETRY)

- **What**: Cline #12270 stores `startedAt: Date.now()` in auth metadata
  when starting a session. Used for analytics/billing dashboards.
- **Why**: Alexi's session metadata is in `src/core/sessionManager.ts`
  and persisted to `~/.alexi/sessions/<id>.json`. Adding
  `startedAt: Date.now()` to `createSession()` is trivial (~5m, 1 line).
  But there's no downstream consumer: no billing system, no analytics
  dashboard, no usage reports. The field would sit unused. Defer until a
  use case materializes (e.g., "show session duration in /sessions list"
  or "aggregate daily session count").
- **Source**: cline/cline `ab68fd7` "Store startedAt in auth metadata
  when starting a Cline session (#12270)" (2026-07-14T01:50:00Z), PR
  #12270.
- **Category**: config. **Size**: small (~5m to add the field, but no
  value without a consumer).
- **Status**: SKIP (low value, no use case).

#### 6. Session fork variant inheritance (POTENTIAL, MODERATE, ~2h)

- **What**: Kilocode #12175 fixed session forking to preserve the
  source's selected model AND reasoning variant (extended, normal, fast).
  Before the fix, forks copied the transcript but reset the variant to
  default, causing a disorienting mid-session switch. The fix: for
  full-session forks, retain model + variant; for historical forks
  (forking at a message point), derive from the latest retained user
  message.
- **Why**: Alexi's `/fork` command at `src/cli/interactive.ts:702-718`
  creates a new session with `state.currentModel` and a new ID, but does
  NOT copy the transcript or preserve any variant/reasoning-level
  selection. We don't track variants at all — no CLI flag, no TUI menu,
  no per-model defaults. Porting the fork fix first requires implementing
  variant selection, which is not a single commit. Design questions:
  - How do users select a variant? `--variant extended` CLI flag? TUI `/variant` command?
  - Where is it stored? Session metadata? Model config?
  - Which SAP AI Core models support variants? (Anthropic extended
    thinking, maybe; others unknown.)
  - What is the default?
  This is a ~2h feature (variant selection + fork preservation), not a
  30-minute port. The fork fix itself is valuable, but only after variant
  selection exists. Surface as a potential enhancement if a user reports
  forking pain, but do not pursue proactively today. No open issue
  requests this.
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode `e2b609e` "Merge pull request #12175 from
  Kilo-Org/investigate-worktree-variant-inheritance"
  (2026-07-14T05:18:51Z), PR #12175. Full PR body at
  https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/pull/12175.
- **Category**: command. **Size**: moderate (~2h, requires variant
  selection first).
- **Status**: POTENTIAL (defer until user-reported need or variant
  selection is designed).

1. **Order**: Only #1 (idle cwd StatusBar) is portable and pending. It is
   already tracked as issue #954 with the `auto-implement` label (visible
   to Agent 3 as of 2026-07-13 backfill). Agent 3 should pick it up in
   the next cycle. No manual intervention needed.
2. **Labeling note**: Issues #954 and #955 both received the
   `auto-implement` label as part of yesterday's backfill. The
   engineering pipeline now has 7 open `auto-implement` issues (up from
   0). The labeling gap is resolved.
3. **Rotation**: No demotions. All three daily repos (kilocode, cline,
   opencode) active (0 dryness). Weekly repos not polled today (Tuesday).
   Next weekly poll: Monday 2026-07-20.
4. **Variant selection feature**: If a user reports "/fork loses my
   reasoning level" or "how do I use extended thinking?", revisit
   kilocode #12175 (finding #6) as the implementation reference. Until
   then, defer.
